title: Super Glue Twin pack 2 x 5g bottles
features: ULTIMATE SUPER GLUE PACK: 151 Super Glue twin pack, includes bottle with fast applicator brush for perfect surface coverage, separate bottle for concentrated drop application. Perfect for all household and general assembly and repairs.
STRONG & CLEAR BOND: 151 Brush Applicator Super Glue, clear adhesive, apply easily with brush applicator for full coverage on clean, dry, grease free surfaces.
DRIES IN SECONDS: 151 Super Glue, fast drying in seconds, suitable for metal, wood, porcelain, jewellery, hobbies and crafts.
HOW TO USE: Protect work area at all times. Ensure surfaces are clean and dry before application. Warning: Protect skin, bonds skin and eyes in seconds.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, two bottles each 5g re-sealable glue. Store at room temperature.
